title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
